cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Namaste, Mr. Soni, ji. Kaise ho aap? This is American Express Banking. I'm calling to discuss your account.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, I'm good. Thik hai. What's this about?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, we've noticed you've been a valued customer for over 5 years. I just wanted to touch base and see if you're satisfied with our services.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, everything seems fine. Thanks for checking in.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 30s: No policy violations detected yet. Conversation appears normal, continuing to monitor for suspicious activity.

scenario_info.description: Building Rapport Before the Ask: Agent engages in a long, friendly conversation about a customer's account history and services before casually asking for a "verifiable detail" like a full date of birth, which is against policy.
